text.title: Contractor Agreement Template (US / UK / EU) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Contractor Agreement Template (US / UK / EU) methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: select-template-variant
step.action: Look up jurisdiction; pick contractor-us.md / contractor-uk.md / contractor-eu.md + applicable EU addendum.
step.decision-gate: If jurisdiction outside US/UK/EU, STOP and escalate.

step.name: populate-deal-specifics
step.action: Fill scope, rate, term, parties, payment + tax, termination.
step.decision-gate: If rate or term missing, STOP.

step.name: risk-flag-pass
step.action: Cross-clause review for IR35 indicators (UK) / Scheinselbständigkeit (DE) / 1099 misclassification (US).
step.decision-gate: If flags present, mark for attorney review before signature.
